title: Claude Code - Tool Analytics
description: Tool intelligence: usage frequency, success rates, execution time, decision analysis, result size

links.title: Overview
links.tooltip: Executive summary with Prometheus + Athena highlights

links.title: Real-Time Metrics (Prometheus)
links.tooltip: Live code edit decisions, development activity rates

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_id FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE team_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY team_id

list.name: user
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY user_display

list.name: tool
list.label: Tool
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tool_name FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name IN ('claude_code.tool_result', 'claude_code.tool_decision') AND tool_name IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY tool_name

targets.rawSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_executions FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%')

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.description: Overall tool execution success rate. Red < 80%, Yellow 80-95%, Green > 95%.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE), 0), 1) AS success_rate FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%')

panels.title: Accept Rate
panels.description: Overall tool decision acceptance rate. Red < 70%, Yellow 70-90%, Green > 90%.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'accept' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE), 0), 1) AS accept_rate FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_decision' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tool_name) AS unique_tools FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%')

panels.title: Tool Usage Frequency
panels.description: Top 20 tools by execution count with success/failure breakdown.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT tool_name, SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN success = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY success_count + failure_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT tool_name, SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'accept' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accept_count, SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'reject' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reject_count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_decision' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY accept_count + reject_count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Tool Performance Summary
panels.description: Execution time and result size by tool with success rate gauge column.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS success_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_duration_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.95), 0) AS p95_duration_ms, ROUND(AVG(CAST(tool_result_size_bytes AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS avg_result_bytes, MAX(tool_result_size_bytes) AS max_result_bytes FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY total DESC

panels.title: Decision Source Distribution
panels.description: How tool decisions are made: config (auto), user (manual), etc.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT COALESCE(source, 'unknown') AS decision_source, decision, COUNT(*) AS count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_decision' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY COALESCE(source, 'unknown'), decision ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Success Rate Trend
panels.description: Hourly tool success rate trend with execution volume overlay.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS success_rate_pct, COUNT(*) AS total_executions FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tool Execution Time Trend
panels.description: Average execution duration per tool over time (top 10 by volume).

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, tool_name, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_duration_ms FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') AND tool_name IN (SELECT tool_name FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10) GROUP BY 1, tool_name ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tool Result Size by Tool
panels.description: Average and max result size in bytes.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT tool_name, ROUND(AVG(CAST(tool_result_size_bytes AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS avg_result_bytes, MAX(tool_result_size_bytes) AS max_result_bytes FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND tool_result_size_bytes IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY avg_result_bytes DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent Tool Errors
panels.description: Latest 50 tool execution failures with error details.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT "timestamp", tool_name, COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display, error, ROUND(duration_ms, 0) AS duration_ms, tool_result_size_bytes AS result_bytes FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' AND success = false AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (tool_name LIKE '${tool}' OR '${tool}' = '%') ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 50
